Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Class StateSnapshot

Namespace
Pandowdy.EmuCore.Services
Assembly
Pandowdy.EmuCore.dll

Immutable snapshot of the emulator's execution state at a specific point in time.

public record StateSnapshot : IEquatable<StateSnapshot>
Inheritance
object
StateSnapshot
Implements
IEquatable<StateSnapshot>
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

This record is immutable and thread-safe. Each state change produces a new instance, which is published through Stream for reactive subscribers.

Constructors

StateSnapshot(ushort, byte, ulong, int?, bool, bool)

Immutable snapshot of the emulator's execution state at a specific point in time.

public StateSnapshot(ushort PC, byte SP, ulong Cycles, int? LineNumber, bool IsRunning, bool IsPaused)

Parameters

PC ushort

Program Counter (16-bit address of the next instruction to execute)

SP byte

Stack Pointer (8-bit offset into the 6502 stack page at 0x0100-0x01FF)

Cycles ulong

Total CPU cycles executed since emulator start or reset

LineNumber int?

Optional line number in disassembly/source code corresponding to the current PC. Null if no source mapping is available.

IsRunning bool

True if the emulator is actively executing instructions (RunAsync is active). False if stopped or not yet started.

IsPaused bool

True if the emulator is paused (execution suspended but can be resumed). False if running or stopped.

Remarks

This record is immutable and thread-safe. Each state change produces a new instance, which is published through Stream for reactive subscribers.

Properties

Cycles

Total CPU cycles executed since emulator start or reset

public ulong Cycles { get; init; }

Property Value

ulong

IsPaused

True if the emulator is paused (execution suspended but can be resumed). False if running or stopped.

public bool IsPaused { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

IsRunning

True if the emulator is actively executing instructions (RunAsync is active). False if stopped or not yet started.

public bool IsRunning { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

LineNumber

Optional line number in disassembly/source code corresponding to the current PC. Null if no source mapping is available.

public int? LineNumber { get; init; }

Property Value

int?

PC

Program Counter (16-bit address of the next instruction to execute)

public ushort PC { get; init; }

Property Value

ushort

SP

Stack Pointer (8-bit offset into the 6502 stack page at 0x0100-0x01FF)

public byte SP { get; init; }

Property Value

byte
